annotations.content: Scene 06_Climate Change Growing Deserts And Likelihood Of Duststorms

A quarter of the world's people
live in arid lands.
A quarter of the world's people live in arid lands.

So we, too, have to deal
with climate change.
So we, too, have to deal with climate change.

And as they do,
so does the likelihood
And as they do, so does the likelihood

of one of nature's
most intimidating events.
of one of nature's most intimidating events.

A wall of dust,
up to a mile high,
A wall of dust, up to a mile high,

are some of the most powerful
ever seen.
are some of the most powerful ever seen.

Unstoppable, they can travel
thousands of miles,
Unstoppable, they can travel thousands of miles,

overwhelming towns and cities
across the world...
overwhelming towns and cities across the world
